events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: Panelboard installation & makeup, industrial site, neutrals & grounds mixed in subpanel. Work in-progress. Need identify hazards severity immediate controls. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk likely high or critical? Mixing neutrals and grounds in subpanel (separately derived system?) In a subpanel, neutral and ground must be separated; neutral current on ground conductors can cause shock, fire, equipment damage. Severity high. Immediate controls: stop work, de-energize panelboard, isolate circuit, correct wiring by separating neutrals and grounds, install isolated neutral bus and ground bus, verify torque, test, re-inspect per NEC 408.3, 408.36, 250, etc. Working clearance 110.26 maybe relevant if access blocked? Scenario doesn't mention clearance but reference includes 110.26. We can mention ensure working clearances. NEC 200.4 about neutral conductors continuity; neutrals must be isolated in panelboards. Art 408 panelboards. Need produce JSON with fields. percent_complete estimate maybe 70? value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. order empty list. workable empty list. findings list. actions list. references list. Need ensure valid JSON. No prose outside JSON.
